description: Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from marvel. Featuring an attractive print on its footbed, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park.Product DetailsRed and green flip-flops with attractive print and branding on footbedBlack and red thong style straps with brand badgeFoamy rubber footbedTPU outsole with patterned nubs, upraised heelMaterial and CareRubber, TPUWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
